programme.desc: After the death of her husband, a woman decides to live the rest of her life as a widow and take care of her young son. She is surprised when her in-laws advise her to remarry and move on with her life.

programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
programme.desc: An Indian anthology film that tells three separate but interconnected stories revolving around the themes of love, sex, and betrayal. The film is shot in a found-footage style, utilizing surveillance cameras, mobile phones, and webcams to capture the stories of individuals from different backgrounds, whose lives are intertwined in unexpected ways. It explores the dark side of relationships and the impact of technology on modern romance.

programme.title: Hello Hum Lallan Bol Rahe Hain

programme.title: Limahl's Never Ending Soundtracks!
programme.desc: 2 decades of movie moments and classic pop hits from the 70s & 80s. Direct from the red carpet - Limahl is ready for his close-up!

programme.title: Far Out, Man!
programme.desc: Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.

programme.title: Country Crossovers! 1970-1979
programme.desc: Through the 70s Country Music threw up regular UK chart smashes - from Anne Murray & Johnny Cash in 1970 to Dr Hook & Kenny Rogers at the end of the decade. And yes there's Dolly!

programme.title: Make Mine A Double with Pat Sharp!
programme.desc: They says 2 heads are better than one & in the 80s the charts were full of collaborations. So pour a large one & have double the fun with Pat Sharp's top 40 duets.

programme.title: The Ultimate 80s Mix!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made the 80s!

programme.title: I Want My Music TV! Top 50
programme.desc: Music TV continues with Bonnie Tyler, Sister Sledge & Madonna, through to million-selling hits from Frankie, Wham! & Soft Cell. These are the official biggest of the 80s!

programme.title: The Rock 100 of the 80s
programme.desc: Mark Goodier brings you our exclusive chart of the 100 biggest rock songs of the 80s, based on streaming data, historic sales info, and enduring global appeal. Crank this up LOUD!

programme.title: Rated Rock! The No.1s
programme.desc: Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programme.title: A Truth Born of Fragility
programme.desc: A whirlwind of sincerity that an indifferent voice cannot hide. Listen to the most honest confessions delivered by a fragile heart. Between collapsing boundaries and bursting revelations, you will encounter the moment when suppressed emotions finally find their truth.

programme.title: Blurry Moment
programme.desc: A moment when all noise fades and your vision blurs. Submerge yourself in surreal landscapes and calm beats. A mood filled only with your own breath, as light as a state of zero gravity.

programme.title: A Warmth That Melts Your Heart
programme.desc: Take a moment to breathe and fill your heart with the warm, comforting voices of Girls' Generation that gently embrace your weary days.

programme.title: Daily Medicine
programme.desc: Scenes from somewhere between vivid reality and hazy imagination, envisioned amidst a monotonous routine. Stay within the flow of these diverse sequences and beats.

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.”

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: 'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Promise' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Promise” is an impressive ballad that begins with a minimal piano melody and gradually builds emotional depth as strings are added in the latter half. The lyrics, written by DOYOUNG, capture the feelings he couldn't easily express as his love grew deeper. Even if the confession comes late, it delivers a sincerity and emotional resonance stronger than any other words.

programme.title: Blurry Moment
programme.desc: A moment when all noise fades and your vision blurs. Submerge yourself in surreal landscapes and calm beats. A mood filled only with your own breath, as light as a state of zero gravity.

programme.title: Girls' Generation: Right now, From now on, Forever
programme.desc: Along Girls' Generation's tireless journey. Meet each moment that came to you as refreshing sunlight, warm comfort, tender confessions, and explosive catharsis.

programme.title: Varanasi
programme.desc: This film documents the spirit of Varanasi in all its glory. It elucidates more about the mythological significance of the city, its place in the pages of history, its cultural heritage and the lifestyle of the locals living there. It also explains the value the city holds in the eyes and hearts of the tourists thronging the city.

programme.title: Smile Pinki
programme.desc: An Oscarwinning documentary about children born with cleft palates in India, and the people working hard to help them. Pinki is a fiveyearold girl with a cleft lip, born into a desperately poor family from a village in the Mirzapur District in India. Pinkis parents did not know that her condition could be fixed with one simple operation until they met Pankaj, a social worker travelling through rural India, gathering patients to go to a hospital in Varanasi that provides free surgery to thousands every year. This reallife fairy tale follows Pinkis journey from a life of isolation and ostracism to a smile of joy.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. This panel is seen on the episodes giving their views on the events, the significance of the event and describing the mood of the era, publics reaction to these events and how it contributed to change the course of Indian history.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Epic Ke Dus is a halfhour collated list of the top ten people, places or events of a chosen topic, examples of which include rivalries, thinkers and warriors. Each topic has been thoroughly researched and a panel of experts on the subject has carefully selected the stories that are fitting to be part of the topic. programme.title: Stung by the Longest Stinger! (Cow Killer Ant)

programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: You Won't Believe This Sailfish Catch!
programme.desc: Coyote reels in a record-breaking sailfish and takes viewers on a high-seas journey filled with education, adrenaline, and ocean conservation.Looks can be deceiving. Dumb cane, a common plant, releases chemicals that scorch skin. Coyote finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Giant Frog Kissed! – Prince or Princess?
programme.desc: In a fairytale-worthy twist, Coyote kisses a giant frog in the name of science and fun. Does it turn into royalty? You'll have to see.A sobering episode recounts a fatal snake bite case. Coyote shares what went wrong and what to do in the event of a venomous encounter.

programme.title: Bitten by a Tarantula!
programme.desc: Mark gets up close with a giant tarantula. Though terrifying to many, he demonstrates how docile and misunderstood these spiders truly are.Ants attack! Coyote puts his feet directly into a swarm of biting ants and records just how painful and rapid their assault can be.

programme.title: Stung by the Gympie Gympie! (World's Most Painful Plant Sting)
programme.desc: Coyote braves the Gympie Gympie, Australia's infamous pain plant. The sting leaves lasting effects and is known to bring grown men to tears.With nothing but his bare hands, Coyote tries catfish noodling—reaching into muddy water for a hidden monster. It's wild, messy, and risky.

programme.title: Yuck! What Creature Made This Slime?!
programme.desc: Mystery slime appears on the forest floor—what creature left it behind? The team investigates this sticky situation.As part of #CampYouTube, Mark builds a tide pool aquarium and fills it with sea creatures from the coast—perfect for learning from home.

programme.title: $100 Coffee vs. 1¢ Coffee – Which Actually Tastes Better?
programme.desc: Is a $100 coffee really better than a $0.01 cup? Coyote hosts a wild taste test to find out if price truly equals flavor. BOOM! Coyote gets hit by a surprise blast during filming. He's okay—but the slow-motion replay says otherwise.

programme.desc: This emotional episode follows chimpanzees rescued from testing labs as they adapt to new lives of freedom and care.Coyote tests an underwater jetpack, soaring through the ocean and meeting sea life in this high-speed dive adventure you have to see to believe!

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Nadine and Jacques are a young, unmarried couple (they also have a wiener dog named Sasha). They purchased an 1886 row house in Summerhill in 2005 and they love the old character of the house. Jacques grew up in Italy and Nadine in Montreal. They run their business out of their home. They like to entertain and find there isn't enough seating for all of their guests.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Madeleine is 10. She is a smart, active girl who enjoys playing soccer, beading, reading and playing with her friends. She rejects girly norms, the colour pink and all things frilly. She is an active member of her school's eco club. Her bedroom is the old master bedroom of the house and it needs updating. They haven't touched it since she was 2 years old when her Mom painted some murals on the walls.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Tomarra and Rob had just married and blended their two families. As a new family, they want to transition to a quiet neighbourhood away from the hustle and bustle of Toronto. Steve is up for the challenge. Rob is a writer and plans to work from home, while Tomarra is a naturopath who would love to have her own studio. Ultimately, they want to start cherishing the real things in life, and that is spending more time with their kids.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Darlene and Bruce are in the market for a new home and have enlisted Laura to help them out. Darlene's one request is that they stay close to their current home, where their daughter goes to school. For Bruce, quality construction materials and workmanship are of paramount importance. One thing the entire family agrees on is that the backyard should have a fantastic entertainment space since they spend plenty of time together outdoors and enjoy having guests over.

programme.title: Accidental Chef

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Finishing their Four Corners adventure, it's Barry's turn, and he's not exactly known for his organization skills! Watch as he takes the friends from Grand Junction to the Grand Mesa and on to Vail and Boulder... How will the guys judge him, and who will be the overall winner?!

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: The couple head to southwestern Oklahoma to climb Quartz Mountain but when Jason's confidence is shaken during a failed slab climb, Tayler realizes she may need to prepare to carry a larger load on their journey out west.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Failed rock climbing, failed training...struggling marriage? When everything seems to have gone wrong on their road trip in Oklahoma, Tayler and Jason are faced with the question..."are we biting off more than we can chew?" as they head to Wyoming.

programme.title: Love On the Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm? Or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: Chef Swap At The Beach
programme.desc: Chef Jarrett King of O.A.K. Prime and Chef Dan Sheppard of Inlet Prohibition are ready to trade restaurants and wow our judges with their take on an entree with a spicy side. Which chef brought enough heat to win the Chef Swap Knife?

programme.title: Chef Swap At The Beach
programme.desc: Steak and Eggs are a breakfast staple, but this hearty combination certainly doesn't have to be boring. Chef Mason pushes the limit of this classic dish as he challenges Chef Derick Carrozza of Filet's and Chef Casey Blake of Drunken Jack's to both bring their “A-game” in each other's kitchens — or should we say their "egg-game"?

programme.title: Q: Alabama's Barbecue Legends
